markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and priorities for the end of 2025 and into 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Lead:** Katya Luscomb now leads day-to-day comms, enabling Jessalynn Jones to focus on editorial quality as content volume increases.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [**Content Audit Review:** Webstacks will review the audit before providing strategic direction, ensuring alignment with their 2026 annual plan.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Immediate Focus:** Prioritize partner content, specifically for Sanity, Contentful, and Storyblock, which drives high-quality pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [**Next Week's Plan:** GrowthX will deliver partner-focused keyword research and a content gap analysis for a joint strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Topics

### Team & Role Updates

  - [**Katya Luscomb (GrowthX):** New lead for day-to-day comms and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
      - [**Why:** Enables Jessalynn Jones to focus on editorial quality as content volume increases.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**Webstacks Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [**Jesse Schor:** Growth team lead; provides strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [**Eric Izazaga:** Marketing lead; executes campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Content Audit Review

  - [**Context:** Jacob (GrowthX) completed a content audit identifying opportunities (e.g., force indexing, pruning, refreshing).](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Decision:** Webstacks will review the audit before providing direction.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Why:** To align content strategy with their 2026 annual plan, which they are finalizing.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Goal:** "Get the house in order" over the next 3 weeks by optimizing existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Partner Content Strategy

  - [**Why:** Partner content drives high-quality pipeline, especially from LLM-referred traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Priority Partners:**](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**CMS:** Sanity, Contentful, Storyblock, Builder](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Frameworks:** Next.js (primary focus), Gatsby (focus on migration content)](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will conduct keyword research and a content gap analysis for these partners.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Eric Izazaga's "coffee chat" with developer Nate provides valuable soundbites for new or refreshed Sanity content.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

### End-of-Year Production

  - [**Status:** GrowthX has a 1-2 week content buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Plan:** Use this buffer for partner content research and analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Deliverables:** December production will be front-loaded to ensure no deliverables are missed during the final week's holiday slowdown.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Webstacks (Jesse & Eric):**](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [Review the content audit doc and Loom video.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Finalize the 2026 annual plan.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Share strategic direction with GrowthX before next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Jessalynn & Katya):**](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for priority partners (Sanity, Contentful, Storyblock, Builder).](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [Analyze existing partner content for refresh/gap opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [Invite Jacob to next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
      - [Extend next week's meeting by 15 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/pRm1sgsKzme71oQwN1xndPgBMUnHqfkR?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
